name: Unplundered Tomb South of Dravesa
status_note: Interior unknown — not yet developed. Needs a full site file before the party returns.
location: South of Dravesa, exact position unrecorded

overview.what_it_is: A single unplundered tomb of unknown provenance south of Dravesa.
overview.current_state: Unplundered at time of first visit (Session 26). Interior unexplored.
overview.historical_context: Ossek Thrice-Buried believes the inscriptions may connect to pre-Silence arcane knowledge on conditional immortality, possibly Ameniseb's work.

environmental: Jackalwere infestation in surrounding area — numbers and lair location unknown

creatures: Jackalweres (area infestation, perimeter threat — decide whether they have a nearby lair or are transient)

knowledge: Tomb inscriptions — Ossek believes they relate to pre-Silence conditional immortality, possibly Ameniseb's work
reputation_gains: Aurka network access through Ossek Thrice-Buried

ossek_thrice_buried.goals: Full inscription rubbing — specifically wants to read and copy the tomb inscriptions at any cost
ossek_thrice_buried.resources_committed: Will recruit Zardoon; will risk his life and others' for the inscriptions
ossek_thrice_buried.knowledge_level: Identified the site and led Zardoon there; knows exterior layout; no interior knowledge

ossek_thrice_buried.accuracy: High on exterior; none on interior
information: Belief that inscriptions connect to Ameniseb and pre-Silence conditional immortality

highly_recommended: Deal with or avoid jackalwere perimeter

hooks: Ossek wants to return for a full inscription rubbing — will recruit Zardoon
Pre-Silence conditional immortality angle may connect to larger campaign threads
Aurka network access through Ossek is a secondary reward
key_npc: Ossek Thrice-Buried (antiquarian, Aurka contacts — will push for inscriptions at the expense of everything else)

dm_notes.design_intent: Develop interior before the party returns. Ossek's three dead partners (Nevret, Bressul, Davanek) are a tone-setter — this site should feel genuinely dangerous.
integration_points: Jackalwere infestation: decide whether they have a lair nearby or are transient — not just flavor, a real perimeter threat
Conditional immortality inscription content should tie to whatever pre-Silence lore is already canon
Ossek cannot be controlled and will get people killed pursuing a rubbing
